---
name: fly.io API Token
description: fly.io FlyV1 API token for frwp-scanner app — use as FLY_API_TOKEN env var
type: reference
---

```
FlyV1 fm2_,fm2_lJPETvcdgreEMxLmjDGg4Ukp5OYxoU6JC0U2DZt53yWku8xug2xDMzO/CtZICyyHTuJmXqRDV5/yvCR50aYeLRz5bRAigT62FMrKR0+IRQSEA8QQCrEMwcU+MyoDhE/RzhD9z8O5aHR0cHM6Ly9hcGkuZmx5LmlvL2FhYS92MZgEks5p3RBAzwAAAAEl1S5eF84AFy/XCpHOABcv1wzEEAQluV+T/2ZmwJ3KAT9Gr2XEINB6hwbYGIFeKvgVhi2gcUyCtlpuwMs4PXMJBR61qzgO
```

Usage:
```bash
export FLY_API_TOKEN="FlyV1 fm2_lJPE..."
~/.fly/bin/flyctl logs --app frwp-scanner
```

App: `frwp-scanner` / Region: `nrt` (Tokyo)
